description: Compares the two seqs and reports the binding site effect on diff seqs
author: GenePattern Team
plan:
## tfsites.CompareAcrossSeqsFromDNA GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
tfsites.CompareAcrossSeqsFromDNA is a GenePattern module that Compares the two seqs and reports the binding site effect on diff seqs

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 15 parameters:
- Required: enhancer.dna.alignment.table, enhancer.functional.group.table, analysis.name, hypothesis, minimum.binding.change
- Optional: tf.affinity.information, tf.affinity.files, pwm.input.file, minimum.pwm.score, motif.input.file, motif.input.format, motif.filter.keywords, motif.use.pseudocounts, motif.background.frequencies, motif.output.name

### 3. Command Line
```
python /build/tfsites-webportal/05-compareTfSitesAcrossSequencesFromDna/05-combined-generateMotifDatabase-and-compareTfSitesAcrossSequencesFromDna.py -e <enhancer.dna.alignment.table> -g <enhancer.functional.group.table>  <tf.affinity.information>  <tf.affinity.files> <pwm.input.file> <motif.input.file> -s <minimum.pwm.score> -n <analysis.name> -y <hypothesis> -b <minimum.binding.change> -n <analysis.name>  <motif.filter.keywords> <motif.input.format> <motif.use.pseudocounts> <motif.background.frequencies> <motif.output.name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/tfsites\:17.1.5

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: enhancer.dna.alignment.table
parameters.description: Tab-separated file containing at least two DNA sequences to be analyzed. We suggest only inputting the alignment +/- 15 bp from where the genetic variation of interest occurs. if this is a SNV, you would simply input the 30bp window of the alignment containing the variant. If this is a deletion, you would add 15 bp upstream of the first - and 15bp downstream of the last -.

parameters.name: enhancer.functional.group.table
parameters.description: Tab-separated file which labels each functional group. Functional group can be either wild-type, control, test, or na. If na, all enhancers associated with that label will be removed from the analysis. Binding sites are searched for within the test group that are not present within the wild-type or control group. At a minimum both of these requirements must be met, (1) at least one control or wild-type must be provided; (2) at least one test must be provided.

parameters.name: analysis.name
parameters.description: Name of the analysis. Used as the prefix of all output filenames.

parameters.name: hypothesis
parameters.description: In the genetic variant do you expect a gain of a site, loss of a site, or would you like to search for both? Default is both.

parameters.name: minimum.binding.change
parameters.description: The minimum change of affinity or PWM binding score classify as increase or decrease in score or affinity. Default is 0.1.

parameters.name: tf.affinity.information
parameters.description: File containing all the information for the transcription factors being analyzed, including its name, binding site definition, desired color on the plot, any PBM relative affinity data, and any PFM relative score data.

parameters.name: tf.affinity.files
parameters.description: TF affinity files referenced in the tf affinity information.

parameters.name: pwm.input.file
parameters.description: JASPAR formatted file with multiple PWMs. You can generate a PWM with the tfsites.GenerateMotifDatabase module.

parameters.name: minimum.pwm.score
parameters.description: Enter the minimum PWM score required for analysis. Default is 0.8.

parameters.name: motif.input.file
parameters.description: PFM or PWM motif input file for motif database generation (optional)

parameters.name: motif.input.format
parameters.description: Motif input format for motif database generation (must be 'pwm' or 'pfm', lowercase, optional)

parameters.name: motif.filter.keywords
parameters.description: File containing a list of keywords used to filter PFMs (optional)

parameters.name: motif.use.pseudocounts
parameters.description: Whether to use pseudocounts for motif database generation (optional, True/False)

parameters.name: motif.background.frequencies
parameters.description: Background frequency for each nucleotide (comma-separated string in order of ATGC, optional)

parameters.name: motif.output.name
parameters.description: Name of motif database output file (optional, will be created in current working directory)
